name: WFBE_NEURODEF_ARTYPOS_LIGHT_EAST
notes: ARTILLERY PIT (LIGHT, 1 AI) — EAST. A single D-30 howitzer in an earthen artillery revetment (clear overhead for high-angle fire, hidden from ground observation, shrapnel-resistant). Rear DShK picket guards the back door; ammo dump behind cover to the rear; HBarrier horseshoe closes the flanks; open front for the tube; rear-left crew entrance. Same soldier logic as the WEST pit with RU/TK kit.

objs.role: earthen artillery revetment — hides gun, clear overhead
howitzer — high-angle fire, tube +Y, NO overhead cover
rear DShK picket — covers the back door
forward wire — keeps dismounts off the muzzle
